## Standalone Service Runtime Retirement Check

This repository is deprecated as an active upstream. New shared runtime work
should start in `evalops/platform` under `pkg/`, `cmd/`, or service-local
`internal/` packages.

- [ ] This PR is a temporary compatibility or retirement-routing change.
- [ ] The corresponding Platform issue or PR is linked.
- [ ] This PR does not introduce new runtime source of truth outside Platform.

Tracking issue: evalops/platform#1768
